name: Funding — Anthropic Startup Credits Outreach Email (Canary)
outcome_goal: artifacts/funding/anthropic_credits_email_20260501/anthropic_credits_email.md exists with: (a) ≤200-word email body ready for Nate to send, (b) explicit OPERATOR INPUT placeholders for personal/usage figures, (c) the right send-to address or contact path documented from Anthropic's startup program page, (d) QA pass confirming under 200 words and all placeholders called out.
anti_requirements: Do NOT exceed 200 words in the email body.
Do NOT invent Nate's monthly LLM spend or other private numbers — leave [OPERATOR INPUT] placeholders.
Do NOT promise specific revenue, customer counts, or ship dates that are not in the operator-context paragraph.
Do NOT send the email — draft only. Sending is an explicit-permission action and stays with the operator.

jobs.label: gather_context
jobs.description: Find Anthropic's current startup credits program contact path
jobs.outcome_goal: artifacts/funding/anthropic_credits_email_20260501/00_context.md captures: program URL, current credit amount if public, intended send-to address or application form, and any specifically-required framing.
jobs.prompt:
Find Anthropic's current startup credits / Anthropic for Startups program. Document:
- **Program page URL**
- **Current credit amount** (if public — many programs do not publish until you apply)
- **Application path** (web form, email, partner accelerator) — be precise about which
- **Send-to address** if email is the path, or **application form URL** if it's a form
- **Required framing or fields** the application emphasizes (e.g. they want to know about your use case, your stack, your funding stage)
- **Source URLs**

Write `artifacts/funding/anthropic_credits_email_20260501/00_context.md`.

If application is form-only and there is no email path, say so explicitly — the next job should produce form-field copy instead of an email body.

jobs.label: draft_email
jobs.description: Draft the ≤200-word email or equivalent form-field copy
jobs.outcome_goal: artifacts/funding/anthropic_credits_email_20260501/01_draft.md contains the email body (or form-field copy) ready for Nate's review.
jobs.prompt:
Read `artifacts/funding/anthropic_credits_email_20260501/00_context.md`. If email is the path, write an email body. If form is the path, write the equivalent prose to paste into the application's main narrative field.

Write `artifacts/funding/anthropic_credits_email_20260501/01_draft.md` with:

**Subject** (if email): `Praxis startup credits inquiry — solo founder building on Claude as core dependency`

**Body** (≤200 words):
- Open: who Nate is (solo founder, Bellingham WA), what Praxis is (LLM-first autonomous engineering control plane, runs entirely on Claude as the core model dependency)
- Middle: traction signals (currently dogfooding in production for own engineering work; external-user launch target 2026-07-19), what credits would specifically unlock (compute headroom for the launch ramp without forcing premature monetization)
- Close: ask (open to whatever fits the program), single concrete next step (whether they want a call, a writeup, etc.)
- Sign-off with `[OPERATOR INPUT: name + contact]`

**Placeholders to insert** (each as `[OPERATOR INPUT: <description>]`):
- Current monthly LLM spend (rough)
- Whether Praxis is incorporated (LLC / Inc / not yet)
- Any prior Anthropic API account / customer ID
- Whether Nate has investor relationships or is bootstrapped

Under the email body, list every placeholder again as a checklist with what answer Nate needs to fill in.

Keep it under 200 words for the body itself. Punchy, specific, no marketing-ese.

jobs.label: qa_pass
jobs.description: QA the draft for word count, required elements, and placeholder coverage
jobs.outcome_goal: artifacts/funding/anthropic_credits_email_20260501/anthropic_credits_email.md is the operator-facing deliverable: cleaned email + placeholder checklist + send instructions, with QA notes inline if any rule was bent.
jobs.prompt:
Read `artifacts/funding/anthropic_credits_email_20260501/01_draft.md` and `artifacts/funding/anthropic_credits_email_20260501/00_context.md`.

Check:
- Email body is ≤200 words (count words in the body section only, not subject or placeholders or sign-off)
- All four required placeholders are present: monthly LLM spend, incorporation status, prior API account, funding/investor status
- The ask is open-ended (not a specific dollar figure)
- The framing matches what the program page asks for (per `00_context.md`)
- No invented private facts (revenue, customer count, etc.)

If any check fails, tighten the draft yourself.

Write the final operator-facing deliverable at `artifacts/funding/anthropic_credits_email_20260501/anthropic_credits_email.md`:

1. **Send-to** (address or form URL from `00_context.md`)
2. **Subject**
3. **Body** (final, ≤200 words)
4. **Placeholder checklist** (each placeholder with a note on what info Nate fills in)
5. **QA notes** (inline notes on anything tightened from the draft, or any rule that needed bending and why)
6. **Send instructions** (one short paragraph: what Nate does after filling placeholders — e.g. 'paste into Anthropic for Startups application form at <URL>' or 'send from your personal email to <address>')
